records.ety: [L. expungere, expunctum, prick out, expunge, settle an account, execute; ex out + pungere to prick, puncture. See Pungent.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Expunged (ks*pnjd"); p. pr. & vb. n. Expunging (ks*pn"jng).]

defs: To blot out, as with pen; to rub out; to efface designedly; to obliterate; to strike out wholly; as, to expunge words, lines, or sentences.
To strike out; to wipe out or destroy; to annihilate; as, to expunge an offense.
quotes: Expunge the whole, or lop th' excrescent parts.
